glosses.zh-Hans: 笔记本电脑; 笔记本
glosses.yue: 手提電腦; 筆記本電腦
glosses.ja: ノートパソコン; ノートPC

sentences.target: Mein Laptop ist heute sehr langsam.

translations.de: Mein Laptop ist heute sehr langsam.
translations.en: My laptop is very slow today.
translations.es: Mi portátil está muy lento hoy.
translations.fr: Mon ordinateur portable est très lent aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi il mio portatile è molto lento.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的笔记本电脑今天很慢。
translations.yue: 我部手提電腦今日好慢。
translations.ru: Сегодня мой ноутбук очень медленно работает.
translations.pt: Meu notebook está muito lento hoje.
translations.he: המחשב הנייד שלי מאוד איטי היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay laptop của tôi rất chậm.
translations.nl: Mijn laptop is vandaag erg traag.
translations.uk: Сьогодні мій ноутбук дуже повільно працює.
translations.hi: आज मेरा लैपटॉप बहुत धीमा है।
translations.pl: Mój laptop jest dziś bardzo wolny.
translations.el: Ο φορητός υπολογιστής μου είναι πολύ αργός σήμερα.
translations.nb: Laptopen min er veldig treg i dag.
translations.id: Laptop saya sangat lambat hari ini.
translations.sv: Min laptop är väldigt långsam i dag.
translations.ro: Laptopul meu este foarte lent astăzi.
translations.cs: Můj notebook je dnes velmi pomalý.
translations.da: Min bærbare er meget langsom i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はノートパソコンの動作がとても遅いです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'Laptop'; nominative singular, marks ownership.
Common noun; head of the subject NP in a copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject with the predicate; present, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb specifying the time frame.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective functioning as a subject complement with 'sein'.

sentences.target: Ich lade den Laptop später auf.

translations.de: Ich lade den Laptop später auf.
translations.en: I will charge the laptop later.
translations.fr: Je chargerai l'ordinateur portable plus tard.
translations.zh-Hans: 我待会儿再给笔记本电脑充电。
translations.yue: 我陣間先幫部手提電腦叉電。
translations.pt: Vou carregar o notebook mais tarde.
translations.he: אטעין את המחשב הנייד אחר כך.
translations.tr: Dizüstü bilgisayarı daha sonra şarj edeceğim.
translations.nl: Ik laad de laptop later op.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में लैपटॉप चार्ज करूँगा।
translations.id: Nanti saya akan mengisi daya laptop.
translations.ro: O să încarc laptopul mai târziu.
translations.ja: ノートパソコンは後で充電します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject, 1st person singular.
Finite verb, present 1st person singular; part of the separable verb with particle 'auf'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular, marking the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'lade'.
Temporal adverb indicating a later time.
Separable verbal particle; completes the verb to 'aufladen' (to charge), placed at clause-end.

sentences.target: Sara sucht ihren Laptop im Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Sara sucht ihren Laptop im Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: Sara is looking for her laptop in the living room.
translations.es: Sara busca su portátil en la sala.
translations.fr: Sara cherche son ordinateur portable dans le salon.
translations.it: Sara sta cercando il suo portatile in salotto.
translations.zh-Hans: 萨拉正在客厅找她的笔记本电脑。
translations.yue: Sara喺客廳搵緊佢部手提電腦。
translations.ru: Сара ищет свой ноутбук в гостиной.
translations.pt: Sara está procurando o notebook dela na sala.
translations.he: שרה מחפשת את המחשב הנייד שלה בסלון.
translations.vi: Sara đang tìm laptop của mình trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: تبحث سارة عن حاسوبها المحمول في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: Sara zoekt haar laptop in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Сара шукає свій ноутбук у вітальні.
translations.hu: Sara a nappaliban keresi a laptopját.
translations.hi: सारा बैठक में अपना लैपटॉप ढूँढ रही है।
translations.pl: Sara szuka swojego laptopa w salonie.
translations.el: Η Σάρα ψάχνει το λάπτοπ της στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Sara leter etter laptopen sin i stuen.
translations.id: Sara sedang mencari laptopnya di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Sara letar efter sin laptop i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Sara își caută laptopul în sufragerie.
translations.cs: Sara hledá svůj notebook v obýváku.
translations.da: Sara leder efter sin bærbare i stuen.
translations.ja: サラはリビングでノートパソコンを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Possessive determiner agreeing with masculine accusative singular 'Laptop'; marks possession.
Common noun; direct object of 'sucht'.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('in dem'); introduces the locative PP.
Noun complement of the preposition 'im'; denotes location.

sentences.target: Der Laptop geht plötzlich nicht mehr an.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈlaptɔp ɡeːt ˈplœt͡slɪç nɪçt meːɐ̯ an/

translations.de: Der Laptop geht plötzlich nicht mehr an.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈlaptɔp ɡeːt ˈplœt͡slɪç nɪçt meːɐ̯ an/
translations.en: The laptop suddenly doesn't turn on anymore.
translations.es: De repente, el portátil ya no enciende.
translations.fr: Soudain, l'ordinateur portable ne s'allume plus.
translations.it: All'improvviso il portatile non si accende più.
translations.ko: 노트북이 갑자기 더 이상 켜지지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 笔记本电脑突然开不了机了。
translations.yue: 部手提電腦突然開唔到機。
translations.pt: De repente, o notebook não liga mais.
translations.he: פתאום המחשב הנייד כבר לא נדלק.
translations.vi: Đột nhiên laptop không bật lên nữa.
translations.ar: فجأة لم يعد الحاسوب المحمول يشتغل.
translations.nl: De laptop gaat ineens niet meer aan.
translations.hu: A laptop hirtelen már nem kapcsol be.
translations.hi: लैपटॉप अचानक अब चालू नहीं हो रहा है।
translations.pl: Nagle laptop już się nie włącza.
translations.el: Ξαφνικά το λάπτοπ δεν ανοίγει πια.
translations.nb: Plutselig vil laptopen ikke slå seg på lenger.
translations.id: Tiba-tiba laptop tidak mau menyala lagi.
translations.ro: Deodată, laptopul nu se mai pornește.
translations.da: Pludselig tænder den bærbare ikke længere.
translations.ja: ノートパソコンが突然起動しなくなりました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular, marking the subject.
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; part of the separable verb with particle 'an' ('angehen' = to turn on).
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates unexpectedness.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Scalar adverb used with negation to indicate cessation ('no longer').
Separable verbal particle; completes the verb to 'angehen' (to switch on).
